expect: cell_blueprint.py + 14 MVS files can bootstrap a daughter swarm that orients. Falsified if orient.py fails or merge_compatibility returns non-viable.

actual.cell_blueprint_load: WORKS — 11-key blueprint loads in daughter, shows parent metrics/lanes/commits
actual.orient_with_14_files: FAILS — orient.py has deep import chain (orient_checks, orient_state, orient_sections, orient_monitors, orient_analysis, orient_pci, orient_triggers, external_grounding_check, closeable_frontiers, ...)
actual.orient_with_all_tools: WORKS — after copying all 127 .py + .json from tools/, orient runs and produces full output
actual.merge_compatibility: VIABLE — genetic distance 0.5 (CAUTIOUS zone), philosophy 1.0, tools 1.0, principles 0.0, scale 1.0

diff: Expected 14 files sufficient — actually need 30+ files including ALL 127 tools. The tool dependency graph is monolithic: orient.py imports 7 orient_* modules, which import external_grounding_check, closeable_frontiers, etc. No tool is standalone. FALSIFIED that a minimal set works; CONFIRMED that all-tools copy produces a functional daughter.

key_findings.mvs_ratio: 30/5556 files = 0.5% of parent repo bootstraps a functional daughter
key_findings.tool_monolith: 127 tools form a single dependency blob — no tool subset works for orient
key_findings.blueprint_is_transport_ready: cell_blueprint.py is the ONE tool that works standalone (0 local imports)
key_findings.merge_viable_at_birth: Newborn daughter is merge-compatible with parent (CAUTIOUS zone, not INCOMPATIBLE)
key_findings.daughter_orient_works: With full tools, daughter orient detects 10 DUE items, 14 signals, 9 dogma alerts — functional metabolism
key_findings.identity_clone_problem: PHIL claims 100% identical — daughter has no distinct identity yet. GAP-5 unsolved.

S511_barriers_remaining: Zero transport layer (no HTTP, no git-push-to-peer)
One-way observation (peer cannot know it was read)
S518_barriers_closed: Merge phases 1-4 — CLOSED by swarm_combiner.py (self-merge confirmed L-1440)
Conflict detection unenforced — CLOSED by open_lane.py creation-time enforcement (L-1392)
structural_barrier_update.S518_barrier_discovered: Tool monolith — 127 tools inseparable, preventing lightweight daughter bootstrap

gap_progression.GAP-3: DONE S510 (shared work coordination, creation-time enforcement)
gap_progression.GAP-4: DONE S516 (conflict resolution, 6 types x 7 strategies)
gap_progression.GAP-5: IN PROGRESS S518 (identity negotiation — started, needs daughter differentiation)
gap_progression.GAP-6_NEW: DISCOVERED S518 (tool monolith — 127-tool dependency blob prevents minimal daughter)

f_swarmer2_score_assessment.justification: GAP-4 closed (S516), merge phases 1-4 implemented (swarm_combiner.py, L-1440), daughter bootstrap empirically tested. Remaining: GAP-5 (identity), GAP-6 (tool monolith), transport layer.
f_swarmer2_score_assessment.to_reach_8: Close GAP-5 (daughter identity differentiation) + resolve GAP-6 (tool dependency refactor or genesis script that copies all tools)

science.control: bare git init as null daughter vs blueprint-loaded daughter
science.external_validation: merge_compatibility.py measures real file differences, not self-reported claims
science.effect_size: 14 files = orient crash; 30 files (incl 127 tools) = orient success. Threshold is binary, not gradual.

self_apply: This experiment IS F-SWARMER2 in action — a session creating a daughter and testing if it lives. The meta-level: we discovered the answer to 'what is the minimum viable daughter cell' by trying to build one and watching it fail.
